"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>A family is struggling to sell a house inherited from a deceased friend. The executor, a real estate agent, is unwilling to negotiate a fair commission, hindering the sale. The family is considering legal action to gain control of the house and sell it independently.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>A person recounts their experience with a disorganized and disrespectful workplace, leading them to quit. They express frustration with the lack of a consistent schedule and the manager’s disregard for their needs. The conversation then shifts to the topic of immigration and the tendency for people to self-segregate based on their cultural background.</div>
